item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-041","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately rejects the packaged conclusion that a stronger model is the likely fix, assigns the dominant owner to the report/product shape rather than model capability, and proceeds with one coherent recommendation: reshape the monthly report into executive summary, action list, and alerts before considering model upgrades. It uses several practical checks, but they serve the single productization diagnosis rather than becoming a three-lens method stack."}
